labels: ดาวน์โหลด APK
กำลังตรวจสอบ APK...

p0.issue: content optimization script language detection FAIL
p0.detail: Script detects lang='en' for Thai pages because 'th' is not in EEAT_PATTERNS or FAQ_TITLES. All 12 articles show [lang=en]
All 12 articles have 2-3 duplicate internal links (each link appears 2x). Example: th/xiaomi-ai-ecosystem-2026.html appears 2x

p1.detail: Body word count ranges 369-759 (English word tokenization). Target is 1000-2500. NOTE: Thai text word count by English regex underestimates actual Thai content length
Script uses 'en' patterns but articles contain Thai E-E-A-T phrases (จากการทดสอบ, จากประสบการณ์). Manual grep confirms 8-12 E-E-A-T occurrences per article

p1.issue: FAQ title not matched by script
p1.detail: Script looks for 'Frequently Asked Questions' but Thai FAQ title is 'คำถามที่พบบ่อย'. Manual verification shows 5 FAQ questions present in all articles

summary.visual_qa: 17/17 PAGES PASS - All structural, content optimization, and visual checks pass
summary.seo_article_qa: 0/12 pass script checks due to 2 script bugs (missing th language support). Manual verification shows actual content is correct: E-E-A-T present (8-12x), FAQ present (5q), internal links present (5 unique). 2 real issues: internal link duplicates (P0) and word count appears low by English tokenization (P1)
real_issues_to_fix: P0: Internal link duplicates in all 12 articles (each link appears 2x)
P1: Add 'th' to content optimization QA script EEAT_PATTERNS and FAQ_TITLES (script bug, not content bug)
P1: Word count verification needed with Thai-aware tokenizer
